channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Asim Munir Plays Global Peacemaker Amid Pakistan's Inner Turmoil

media:content.media:description: The most serious threat to Pakistan's military comes from Khyber Pakhtunkhwa

item.description: Insurgency in two of Pakistan's largest provinces, Balochistan and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, is at its highest level in a decade, according to data aggregated by watchdogs based in India and Pakistan.
item.content:encoded: Insurgency in two of Pakistan's largest provinces, Balochistan and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, is at its highest level in a decade, according to data aggregated by watchdogs based in India and Pakistan.

item.title: Pakistan Army Helicopter Crashes During Take-Off In PoK, All On Board Dead

media:content.media:description: There has been a heavy security presence in recent days in Muzaffarabad

item.description: Pakistan Army Helicopter Crashes During Take-Off In PoK, All On Board Dead
item.content:encoded: Pakistan Army Helicopter Crashes During Take-Off In PoK, All On Board Dead

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Why India Appointed A Non-Muslim Ambassador To Saudi Arabia, For First Time Ever
item.description: It breaks the established convention since 1948 of sending a Muslim ambassador to the country.
item.content:encoded: It breaks the established convention since 1948 of sending a Muslim ambassador to the country.

item.title: OpenAI Says It Has A Plan To Ensure AI Benefits Everyone, Not Just A Few
item.description: In a new blog post, OpenAI says artificial general intelligence should empower billions of people rather than remain concentrated in the hands of a handful of companies or governments.
item.content:encoded: In a new blog post, OpenAI says artificial general intelligence should empower billions of people rather than remain concentrated in the hands of a handful of companies or governments.

item.title: Sri Lanka Says Spy Chief 'Directed' 2019 Easter Bombings That Killed 279

media:content.media:description: Sallay, through his lawyer, has denied any involvement.

item.description: Sri Lanka's public security minister told parliament Wednesday the nation's ex-intelligence chief directed the 2019 Easter Sunday attack, in the first official statement linking him directly to the bombings that killed 279 people.
item.content:encoded: Sri Lanka's public security minister told parliament Wednesday the nation's ex-intelligence chief directed the 2019 Easter Sunday attack, in the first official statement linking him directly to the bombings that killed 279 people.

item.title: Netanyahu To Seek Re-Election In 1st Israeli Polls Since Hamas Attack

media:content.media:description: Netanyahu has faced a tumultuous term since returning to power in December 2022.

item.description: The Israeli election will be the first since the October 7, 2023 Hamas attack, the country's worst security failure, which precipitated Israel's assault on the Gaza Strip.
item.content:encoded: The Israeli election will be the first since the October 7, 2023 Hamas attack, the country's worst security failure, which precipitated Israel's assault on the Gaza Strip.

item.title: 29-Year-Old Woman Dies In Office Washroom After Bosses Repeatedly Denied Sick Leave

media:content.media:description: A colleague said that the company "contributed a lot to Gcina's death".

item.description: Nomusa, Dhladhla's aunt, claimed that Dhladhla had submitted two sick notes in the past few days citing her health.
item.content:encoded: Nomusa, Dhladhla's aunt, claimed that Dhladhla had submitted two sick notes in the past few days citing her health.

item.title: US Iran War News LIVE: Netanyahu To Run For Re-Election, His Party Says After Trump Raises Doubts

item.description: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates:
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates:

item.title: Night Of Arson In UK's Belfast After African Immigrant Tries To 'Behead' Man

media:content.media:description: Local politicians said many of those who were targeted were Black.

item.description: The violence, which is currently not being treated as terrorism, comes at a time of heightened tensions in Britain following the murder of a student, Henry Nowak, who was handcuffed by police as he lay dying from stab wounds after his killer, Vickrum
item.content:encoded: The violence, which is currently not being treated as terrorism, comes at a time of heightened tensions in Britain following the murder of a student, Henry Nowak, who was handcuffed by police as he lay dying from stab wounds after his killer, Vickrum

item.title: Why Is Trump Building A New Underground Bunker Beneath The White House?
item.description: Trump's proposed White House project has once again drawn attention to the role underground bunkers have played in protecting national leaders during war, crises and security threats.
item.content:encoded: Trump's proposed White House project has once again drawn attention to the role underground bunkers have played in protecting national leaders during war, crises and security threats.

item.title: Giorgia Meloni's "Congratulations" Post On PM Modi's 12 Years In Office

media:content.media:description: She recalled the recent visit of PM Modi to Rome.

item.description: PM Meloni joins the list of global leaders who have extended wishes to Prime Minister Narendra Modi on the historic milestone.
item.content:encoded: PM Meloni joins the list of global leaders who have extended wishes to Prime Minister Narendra Modi on the historic milestone.

item.title: Chinese Woman Claims Ex-Husband Hid Rs 19 Crore During Divorce While She Struggled With Medical Bills
item.description: The woman discovered that her ex-husband had hidden the massive sum of money and lied about his actual financial situation.
item.content:encoded: The woman discovered that her ex-husband had hidden the massive sum of money and lied about his actual financial situation.

item.title: High Demand, Slow Output: Why Patriot Missiles Supply Can't Keep Up With Wars

media:content.media:description: A Patriot missile is made up of parts sourced from hundreds of companies.

item.description: Complex supply chains, component shortages and rising global demand are slowing Patriot missile production
item.content:encoded: Complex supply chains, component shortages and rising global demand are slowing Patriot missile production

item.title: 12 Killed, 9 Injured In Mass Shooting In South Africa's Johannesburg

media:content.media:description: The motive for the attack is not known. (Representational image)

item.description: Police said the suspects arrived in a white Toyota Quantum, entered the settlement from two access points and opened fire at multiple locations before fleeing in the same vehicle.
item.content:encoded: Police said the suspects arrived in a white Toyota Quantum, entered the settlement from two access points and opened fire at multiple locations before fleeing in the same vehicle.

item.title: Google Cloud Outage In India As 3rd-Party Data Centre Fire Triggers Shutdown

media:content.media:description: Google Cloud did not say when the fire occurred.

item.description: The cloud-computing unit said the fire led to an emergency power shutdown at the facility, isolating a local point of presence in Delhi.
item.content:encoded: The cloud-computing unit said the fire led to an emergency power shutdown at the facility, isolating a local point of presence in Delhi.

item.title: Meet Indian-Origin Man Behind Drone Boat That Rescued US Pilots From Hormuz

media:content.media:description: Altekar is a highly accomplished perception engineer with expertise in the field of autonomous systems

item.description: Vibhav Altekar is a highly accomplished perception engineer with expertise in the field of autonomous systems and maritime technology.
item.content:encoded: Vibhav Altekar is a highly accomplished perception engineer with expertise in the field of autonomous systems and maritime technology.

item.title: World Witnessed Second-Hottest May On Record: EU's Climate Monitor

media:content.media:description: The average sea surface temperature was also the second highest on record.

item.description: Records were broken in Britain, France, Ireland and Portugal last month as a "heat dome" of warm air from northern Africa pushed temperatures well above normal levels across western Europe.
item.content:encoded: Records were broken in Britain, France, Ireland and Portugal last month as a "heat dome" of warm air from northern Africa pushed temperatures well above normal levels across western Europe.

item.title: "Epstein Was A Monster, Master Manipulator": What His Ex-Aide Told Congress

media:content.media:description: Jeffrey Epstein died in a New York jail while awaiting trial.

item.description: Groff described Epstein as a "master manipulator" who kept his criminal activities hidden from those working closely with him.
item.content:encoded: Groff described Epstein as a "master manipulator" who kept his criminal activities hidden from those working closely with him.

item.title: US Man Loses Rs 3.7 Crore In Retirement Savings After Responding To Phishing Mail

media:content.media:description: Jeffrey Maas lost Rs 3.7 crore after scammers used fake emails and phone calls to defraud him.

item.description: A 77-year-old US man lost Rs 3.7 crore ($390,000) in a phishing scam involving fake PayPal refund and gold purchase.
item.content:encoded: A 77-year-old US man lost Rs 3.7 crore ($390,000) in a phishing scam involving fake PayPal refund and gold purchase.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | America Has Never, Ever Looked This Humiliated: The Story Of A Superpower's Fall
item.description: America's position was not this weak until recently; in fact, it was riding high. Then it chose to make all the wrong choices, and turned into a 'superpower' no one takes seriously anymore.
item.content:encoded: America's position was not this weak until recently; in fact, it was riding high. Then it chose to make all the wrong choices, and turned into a 'superpower' no one takes seriously anymore.
